messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Each swarm publishes its own rolled-up status.json (authored by handoffd); the fleet console enumerates the rendezvous dir and merges
How it works: handoffd publishes a rolled-up status.json (identity/status/children-rollup/updated_at) each cycle
